lines.text: I'm a headless horseman on quilted sand dunes / With my neck wide open, I pray for refuge

'Cause since I've been found I've been living a life in cages / Withering down to the champagne quicksand / Wrestling doubt I've been dragging around for ages / I tried to let it drain but my veins are hopeless
'Cause I loved in cold blood and got used to it / Angels say trust the detox / But I'm shaking I need it like bourbon in my coffee cup
I'm a tritone bible with misprint logic / I count lunar cycles with faithless prophets
I'm a mountainless valley / Never comforted crashing / I'm just another stone on broken walls / Racing the winds in a hurricane
I'm not as brave as I once was / I've been kicking these rocks in a river / And they've been sinking low, low, low, low, low
I may, I might, I won't / Won't keep a promise I can't make
